mapper.select: SELECT id as businessId, 'EXPENSE' as businessType, expense_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, expense_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_expense WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id as businessId, 'EXPENSE' as businessType, expense_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, expense_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_expense WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id as businessId, 'EXPENSE' as businessType, expense_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, expense_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_expense WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_expense WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id as businessId, 'EXPENSE' as businessType, expense_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, expense_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_expense WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_expense WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT expense_no FROM oa_expense WHERE expense_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY expense_no DESC LIMIT 1
